title: 目標達成の後に・最終決戦へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital has finished her spring tour of the
senior G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What's the word, Trainer? What do you think of
my results?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I've been running constantly just like we planned, right? It's been amazing, right? Nudge, nudge!
choice_data_list: You're not just an all-rounder, you're the All-Rounder!
You're not just an all-rounder, you're the All-Rounder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, hearing that never gets old! ♪ Guess I'll
keep doing what I need to live up to that praise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She certainly has been exceptional. And now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The time has come. A battle to rival Sekigahara...
Hulao Pass... Midnight on merch drop days! In
other words—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's go time! I'll be going up against Opera O and
Doto in the battle to end all battles!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've experienced so many things leading up to this
point.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've grappled with countless runners on both turf
and dirt.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I may not have any distinguishing strengths, but I
stand out by taking on anyone, anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Each step I've taken has set the stage for what's
now to come!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll put all of the experience I've gained running
both turf and dirt to good use... and I'll overcome
my two idols!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And not only that, my performance itself will be a
celebration symbolizing how utterly magnificent
Umamusume are! It's the ultimate simping!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's time to put "Project Digitan" into action!
Trainer, which racecourse should be the stage for
my great finale this fall?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A true hero doesn't choose their battlefield, but
let's make an exception today. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We put our heads together to think.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
First of all, we can forget about dirt. Of the three
of us, I'm the only one of us who can run on it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That rules out miles as well. I'm fine with short
distances, but the others are better built for
medium and long-distance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, how about...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HWHAT?! Say that one more time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking exactly the same thing, and you
repeating it just sealed the deal.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What better place to bring out the best in Opera
O and Doto than a 2,000-meter turf race at
Tokyo Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And that's where I'll do it! I'm gonna be a star! No!
Even better—I'm gonna be an oshi!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, why wouldn't it be?
choice_data_list: You're putting yourself at a disadvantage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh... Well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
2,000 meters of Tokyo turf truly makes for the
quintessential medium-distance race. It's the
perfect stage to test one's true ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no trick that will guarantee a win. Skill
and skill alone must carry us to victory against
opponents as powerful as T.M. Opera O and
Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're absolutely right, but... what are you gonna
do? It's just my nature.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna see my adorable Umas where they can
shine their brightest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna drag them into my lane and cheese
a win. At that point, I'd rather just not run in the
first place.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Shine bright, my Umas! And shine even brighter,
Digitan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: This is what it means to be cool! This is the definition of simping!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, are you with me, Trainer? Will you indulge me
in this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I knew you were a real one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Not that I ever doubted you, hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital knows no doubt—it isn't in her DNA
as an obsessive fangirl.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The exceptional All-Rounder is running in the
autumn Tenno Sho. And the news spreads like
wildfire throughout Tracen Academy.
